tables.name: frpm
tables.description: Free or Reduced Price Meals (FRPM) eligibility data for California schools, used as a socioeconomic indicator. Contains 500 records.

columns.name: 2013_14_calpads_fall_1_certification_status
columns.description: Certification status flag from the CALPADS system for 2013-14 Fall 1 reporting. Type: TEXT. Values: '1' (certified).

columns.name: academic_year
columns.description: Academic year for the data. Type: TEXT. Example: '2014-2015'.

columns.name: charter_funding_type
columns.description: Funding type for charter schools. Type: TEXT. Values: 'Directly funded', 'Locally funded', or empty if not a charter school.

columns.name: charter_school_y_n
columns.description: Whether the school is a charter school. Type: TEXT. Values: '0.0' (no) or '1.0' (yes).

columns.name: charter_school_number
columns.description: Charter school identification number. Type: TEXT. Empty if not a charter school. Examples: '0067'.

columns.name: county_name
columns.description: California county where the school is located. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'Alameda', 'Butte', 'Imperial'.

columns.name: district_name
columns.description: Name of the school district. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'Oakland Unified', 'Paradise Unified', 'Butte County Office of Education'.

columns.name: district_type
columns.description: Type of school district. Type: TEXT. Values: 'Unified School District', 'County Office of Education (COE)', 'Elementary School District', 'High School District'.

columns.name: educational_option_type
columns.description: Type of educational program. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'Special Education School', 'Continuation School', 'Juvenile Court School', 'Traditional'.

columns.name: enrollment_ages_5_17
columns.description: Number of enrolled students aged 5-17. Type: TEXT (numeric string or empty). Examples: '95.0', '25.0'.

columns.name: enrollment_k_12
columns.description: Total K-12 enrollment count. Type: TEXT (numeric string). Examples: '1.0', '102.0', '28.0'.

columns.name: frpm_count_ages_5_17
columns.description: Count of students aged 5-17 eligible for Free or Reduced Price Meals. Type: TEXT (numeric or empty).

columns.name: frpm_count_k_12
columns.description: Count of K-12 students eligible for Free or Reduced Price Meals. Type: TEXT (numeric or empty).

columns.name: free_meal_count_ages_5_17
columns.description: Count of students aged 5-17 eligible for Free Meals specifically. Type: TEXT (numeric or empty).

columns.name: free_meal_count_k_12
columns.description: Count of K-12 students eligible for Free Meals specifically. Type: TEXT (numeric or empty).

columns.name: high_grade
columns.description: Highest grade level served by the school. Type: TEXT. Examples: '12', 'Adult', 'K'.

columns.name: low_grade
columns.description: Lowest grade level served by the school. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'K', '9', 'Adult'.

columns.name: nslp_provision_status
columns.description: National School Lunch Program provision status. Type: TEXT. Values: 'Provision 2', 'Provision 3', or empty.

columns.name: percent_eligible_frpm_ages_5_17
columns.description: Percentage of students aged 5-17 eligible for FRPM. Type: TEXT (decimal 0-1). Examples: '0.842' (~84.2%).

columns.name: percent_eligible_frpm_k_12
columns.description: Percentage of K-12 students eligible for FRPM. Type: TEXT (decimal 0-1). Examples: '0.843' (~84.3%).

columns.name: percent_eligible_free_ages_5_17
columns.description: Percentage of students aged 5-17 eligible for Free Meals. Type: TEXT (decimal 0-1).

columns.name: percent_eligible_free_k_12
columns.description: Percentage of K-12 students eligible for Free Meals. Type: TEXT (decimal 0-1).

columns.name: school_name
columns.description: Name of the school. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'Young Adult Program', 'Ridgeview High (Continuation)', 'Table Mountain'.

columns.name: school_type
columns.description: Classification of the school type. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'Special Education Schools (Public)', 'Continuation High Schools', 'Juvenile Court Schools'.

tables.name: satscores
tables.description: SAT test scores data for California schools and districts, including average scores and test-taker counts. Contains 500 records.

columns.name: avg_scr_math
columns.description: Average SAT Math score. Type: TEXT (decimal string or empty). Examples: '451.0'. Range: typically 200-800.

columns.name: avg_scr_read
columns.description: Average SAT Reading score. Type: TEXT (decimal string or empty). Examples: '441.0'.

columns.name: avg_scr_write
columns.description: Average SAT Writing score. Type: TEXT (decimal string or empty). Examples: '434.0'.

columns.name: num_ge1500
columns.description: Number of test takers scoring >= 1500 total (combined Math+Reading+Writing). Type: TEXT (decimal or empty). Examples: '13.0'.

columns.name: num_tst_takr
columns.description: Total number of SAT test takers. Type: TEXT (numeric string). Examples: '67', '0', '9'.

columns.name: cname
columns.description: County name. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'Imperial', 'Humboldt'.

columns.name: dname
columns.description: District name. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'Holtville Unified', 'Loleta Union Elementary', 'San Pasqual Valley Unified'.

columns.name: enroll12
columns.description: 12th grade enrollment count. Type: TEXT (numeric string). Examples: '142', '22', '38'.

columns.name: rtype
columns.description: Record type indicating reporting level. Type: TEXT. Values: 'S' (school), 'D' (district), 'X' (state).

columns.name: sname
columns.description: School name (empty for district-level records). Type: TEXT. Examples: 'Pacific View Charter'.

tables.name: schools
tables.description: Comprehensive California school directory with administrative contacts, location, type, and status information. Contains 500 records.

columns.name: adm_email1
columns.description: Email address of the primary school administrator. Type: TEXT.

columns.name: adm_email2
columns.description: Email address of the secondary administrator. Type: TEXT. Often empty.

columns.name: adm_email3
columns.description: Email address of the third administrator. Type: TEXT. Often empty.

columns.name: adm_f_name1
columns.description: First name of the primary administrator. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'Laura', 'Michael'.

columns.name: adm_f_name2
columns.description: First name of the secondary administrator. Type: TEXT. Often empty.

columns.name: adm_f_name3
columns.description: First name of the third administrator. Type: TEXT. Often empty.

columns.name: adm_l_name1
columns.description: Last name of the primary administrator. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'Kerns', 'Ervin'.

columns.name: adm_l_name2
columns.description: Last name of the secondary administrator. Type: TEXT. Often empty.

columns.name: adm_l_name3
columns.description: Last name of the third administrator. Type: TEXT. Often empty.

columns.name: charter
columns.description: Whether the school is a charter school. Type: TEXT. Values: '0.0' (no) or '1.0' (yes).

columns.name: charter_num
columns.description: Charter school number. Type: TEXT. Empty if not a charter. Examples: '0067'.

columns.name: city
columns.description: City where the school is located. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'Magalia', 'Paradise', 'Oakland'.

columns.name: closed_date
columns.description: Date when the school was closed. Type: TEXT. Empty if the school is still active.

columns.name: county
columns.description: County where the school is located. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'Butte', 'Alameda'.

columns.name: doc
columns.description: District Ownership Code. Type: TEXT (numeric). Examples: '54'.

columns.name: doc_type
columns.description: District Ownership Code type description. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'Unified School District'.

columns.name: district
columns.description: Name of the school district. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'Paradise Unified', 'Oakland Unified'.

columns.name: eil_code
columns.description: Educational Instruction Level code. Type: TEXT. Values: 'ELEM', 'ELEMHIGH', 'HS', 'INTRMDT'.

columns.name: eil_name
columns.description: Educational Instruction Level name. Type: TEXT. Values: 'Elementary', 'Elementary-High Combination', 'High School'.

columns.name: ed_ops_code
columns.description: Educational Operations code. Type: TEXT. Values: 'TRAD' (Traditional), 'CON' (Continuation), etc.

columns.name: ed_ops_name
columns.description: Educational Operations name. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'Traditional', 'Continuation School'.

columns.name: ext
columns.description: Phone extension number for the school. Type: TEXT. Often empty.

columns.name: funding_type
columns.description: Funding type for charter schools. Type: TEXT. Values: 'Directly funded', 'Locally funded', or empty.

columns.name: g_soffered
columns.description: Grade span offered by the school. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'K-5', 'K-12', '9-12'.

columns.name: g_sserved
columns.description: Grade span actually served. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'K-5', 'K-12', '11-12'.

columns.name: last_update
columns.description: Date of last record update. Type: TEXT (YYYY-MM-DD). Examples: '2016-07-19', '2015-09-10'.

columns.name: latitude
columns.description: Latitude coordinate of the school location. Type: TEXT (decimal degrees). Examples: '39.853672', '37.8132'.

columns.name: longitude
columns.description: Longitude coordinate of the school location. Type: TEXT (decimal degrees, negative). Examples: '-121.5978', '-122.28784'.

columns.name: magnet
columns.description: Whether the school is a magnet school. Type: TEXT. Values: '0.0' (no) or '1.0' (yes).

columns.name: mail_city
columns.description: Mailing address city. Type: TEXT.

columns.name: mail_state
columns.description: Mailing address state abbreviation. Type: TEXT. Value: 'CA'.

columns.name: mail_str_abr
columns.description: Abbreviated mailing street address. Type: TEXT.

columns.name: mail_street
columns.description: Full mailing street address. Type: TEXT.

columns.name: mail_zip
columns.description: Mailing address ZIP code (with optional +4 extension). Type: TEXT. Examples: '95954-9152', '95969-3271'.

columns.name: nces_dist
columns.description: NCES (National Center for Education Statistics) district identifier. Type: TEXT. Examples: '0629820', '0628050'.

columns.name: nces_school
columns.description: NCES school identifier. Type: TEXT. Examples: '05712', '04345', '12325'.

columns.name: open_date
columns.description: Date when the school was opened. Type: TEXT (YYYY-MM-DD). Examples: '1996-08-28', '1994-08-31'.

columns.name: phone
columns.description: School phone number. Type: TEXT. Examples: '(530) 873-3785', '(530) 872-1171'.

columns.name: soc
columns.description: School Ownership Code (numeric). Type: TEXT. Examples: '60', '65', '68'.

columns.name: soc_type
columns.description: School Ownership Code type description. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'Elementary Schools (Public)', 'K-12 Schools (Public)', 'Continuation High Schools'.

columns.name: school
columns.description: Name of the school. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'Cedarwood Elementary', 'HomeTech Charter', 'Ralph J. Bunche High'.

columns.name: state
columns.description: State abbreviation. Type: TEXT. Value: 'CA'.

columns.name: status_type
columns.description: Current operational status of the school. Type: TEXT. Values: 'Active', 'Closed', 'Merged', 'Pending'.

columns.name: street
columns.description: Physical street address of the school. Type: TEXT.

columns.name: street_abr
columns.description: Abbreviated physical street address. Type: TEXT.

columns.name: virtual
columns.description: Whether the school operates virtually. Type: TEXT. Values: 'N' (no), 'P' (partial), 'Y' (yes), 'F' (full).

columns.name: website
columns.description: School website URL. Type: TEXT. May be empty. Examples: 'www.cedarwood.pusdk12.org', 'www.hometech.org'.

columns.name: zip
columns.description: Physical address ZIP code. Type: TEXT. Examples: '95954-9152', '95969-3271'.
